subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The Prisoner maketh mention of thee with that whereby shall endure the remembrance of every soul who hath taken the chalice of immortality in the Name of Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین یذکرک المسجون بما یبقی به ذکر کل مقبل اخذ کاس البقاء باسم البهاء و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
